report.summary: Day 70 cycle v7: No new commits since Mar 17 (7 days). Git locks still blocking pushes (P0). 658 uncommitted files (+4 since v6). All 6 API routes present with cache headers. 42 TS errors unchanged. Rate limiter and defi-yields fallback still unwired (40+ cycles).

sections.title: QA Tester
items: PUBLISHED SLUGS: 434 total in published-pages.ts (+2 since v6). 331 have dedicated page.tsx files; 103 rely on dynamic [slug] routes or are missing.
TYPESCRIPT ERRORS: 42 errors in src/lib/structured-data.examples.ts (JSX-in-TS syntax). Unchanged from last cycle. Masked by ignoreBuildErrors:true.
BUILD SAFETY: ignoreBuildErrors still active — build succeeds but type safety is compromised.
LIVE SITE: Egress blocked from sandbox — unable to verify HTTP 200s. No code changes since last verified cycle.
NO NEW REGRESSIONS: 0 commits this cycle, no new breakage introduced.

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: ALL 6 CORE API ROUTES PRESENT: prices, trending, fear-greed, market-metrics, market-dominance, defi-yields — all have route.ts with cache headers.
CACHE HEADERS: 9 API route files contain stale-while-revalidate or Cache-Control headers (prices, trending, fear-greed, market-metrics, market-dominance, defi-yields, cache-stats, health, news-rss).
RATE LIMITER: Still only wired to cache-stats and health routes. NOT wired to the 6 core public routes (40+ cycles unfixed).
DEFI-YIELDS FALLBACK: Still 0 fallback data references in defi-yields/route.ts (40+ cycles unfixed).
LIVE API HEALTH: Cannot verify runtime — egress blocked. No code changes since last healthy check.

sections.title: DevOps
items: PRODUCTION: Running commit e999560 (Day 62 publish), deployed Mar 17. No new deploys in 7 days.
GIT LOCKS [P0]: .git/HEAD.lock (Mar 16 11:17) + .git/index.lock (Mar 16 13:06) — now 8 days old. All commits and pushes blocked. Fix: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock
WORKING TREE DRIFT: 658 uncommitted files (47 modified + 611 untracked). +4 files since v6 cycle.
VERCEL: Project prj_2Hn4Kdtu6fM13sSpxsdnmsJWGI75 configured. Cannot verify panel status from sandbox.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: 0 commits, 0 deploys. Development stalled by git locks.
BLOCKER [P0]: Git lock files — 8 days old. Single command fix: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock
CARRY-OVER [P1]: Rate limiter not wired to 6 core API routes (40+ cycles).
CARRY-OVER [P1]: defi-yields missing fallback data (40+ cycles).
CARRY-OVER [P1]: 42 TS errors in structured-data.examples.ts need cleanup.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 103 published slugs without dedicated page.tsx files.
DELTA vs v6: +4 uncommitted files (654 → 658), +2 published slugs (432 → 434), git locks now 8 days old.
RECOMMENDATION: Resolve git locks immediately, then batch-commit the 658 pending files before further drift accumulates.
